commands.review_summary:
The PR updates auto-reply session handling, reply-run admission, Gateway agent sessions, and channel-turn diagnostics to recover visible terminal sessions in place, clear stale reply operations, and warn on zero-count visible dispatches with focused tests.

PR surface: Source +181, Tests +590. Total +771 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main reuses fresh failed terminal session entries and active-run admission has no terminal recovery branch, matching the linked silent-drop report. I did not run the repro in this read-only review.
